output.summary: Replaced SelectControl with ToggleGroupControl for pagination mode in Archive.tsx for better UX. This provides a visual toggle interface instead of a dropdown, matching the pattern used throughout the codebase.

fixesApplied.description: Replaced SelectControl with ToggleGroupControl for pagination mode control
changes: Lines 3-8: Updated import from @wordpress/components to replace SelectControl with __experimentalToggleGroupControl (aliased as ToggleGroupControl) and __experimentalToggleGroupControlOption (aliased as ToggleGroupControlOption)
Lines 113-129: Replaced SelectControl JSX with ToggleGroupControl containing two ToggleGroupControlOption children
Added __next40pxDefaultSize prop to ToggleGroupControl to match codebase convention
Simplified structure: removed options array, moved option definitions inline as child components
fixesApplied.pattern: This follows the established pattern in other blocks: Form.tsx, Accordion.tsx, FullWidthMedia.tsx, ContentWithMedia.tsx, ButtonRow.tsx, CallToAction.tsx, DynamicContentCarousel.tsx, GalleryCarousel.tsx, Hero.tsx, MasonryCards.tsx, TestimonialsCarousel.tsx all use __experimentalToggleGroupControl with the alias convention.

syncStatus.notes: TSX-only change. No PHP changes needed. The paginationMode attribute and its values ('load-more', 'pagination') remain unchanged.

testPage.note: Test page already has 11 Archive variations. No test page changes needed for this fix.

notes: UX improvement: ToggleGroupControl provides a more intuitive visual toggle interface compared to a dropdown
The __experimental prefix with alias is the established convention in this codebase
__next40pxDefaultSize ensures consistent sizing with other inspector panel controls
The two options ('Load More' and 'Pagination') are now represented as ToggleGroupControlOption children
No behavioral changes - the control still sets the same paginationMode attribute with the same values
Build passes without errors, ready for use in the editor

uxImprovement.before: SelectControl dropdown showing 'Load More' or 'Pagination' as a select option list
uxImprovement.after: ToggleGroupControl showing two horizontal toggle buttons for 'Load More' and 'Pagination', with the selected option visually highlighted
uxImprovement.benefit: More immediate visual feedback, clearer indication of the current selection, and easier to toggle between the two options without opening a dropdown
